# Org Context Map
# This file lists the repos this org coordinates and their .codex/ entry points.
# Update when repos are added or removed from the org.

     Scope: org-level coordination
     Source: generated by step-11-org-scaffold

<!-- Scope: org-level. Per-project equivalent: [project]/.codex/llms.txt -->

## Org Coordination (this repo)

This repo is the [ORG_NAME] org coordination hub. It holds the cross-project backlog,
shared validated facts, authenticated service registry, and org-level commands.
Path: [ORG_REPO_PATH]
Reference: [ORG_REPO_PATH]/reference/
Commands: [ORG_REPO_PATH]/commands/

## Projects

[REPO_NAME_1]: [path or URL] — [one-line description of this project]
[REPO_NAME_2]: [path or URL] — [one-line description of this project]
# Add entries as repos join the org. Format:
# [REPO_NAME_N]: [path or URL] — [one-line description]

## Cross-Repo State

- Org backlog: [ORG_REPO_PATH]/BACKLOG.md
- Org session: [ORG_REPO_PATH]/state/session.md
- Shared reference: [ORG_REPO_PATH]/reference/
- Validated facts: [ORG_REPO_PATH]/reference/validated-facts-org.md
